name: WSL Execution Detected
description: Detects the execution of `wsl.exe` with command-line arguments `-e` or `--exec`, indicating the execution of Linux commands. Adversaries may use WSL to execute both Windows and Linux binaries.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'wsl.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the wsl.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute wsl.exe, including '-e' or '--exec'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which wsl.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
